name: bash-task-kit-mcp-peer
description: Symmetric peer MCP + mTLS workspace executor

scripts.lint: node --check core/mcp-server.js && node --check core/peer-daemon.js && node --check core/peer-lib.js && node --check core/render-machine-config.js
